body:
Fixes #1814

## Summary

- Add `lino-i18n` as a dependency and update it to `^0.1.1`, the latest npm release observed on 2026-05-18.
- Route Hive Mind translation loading/runtime lookup through `lino-i18n` while keeping the existing i18n wrapper API.
- Convert all existing locale catalogues to deeper nested `.lino` blocks with triple-quoted multiline strings.
- Preserve every existing runtime translation key by using upstream `lino-i18n` compatibility aliases: `collapseTail` and `parentLabel`.
- Remove Hive Mind's local alias-expansion implementation now that the upstream issues are closed and released.
- Add regression coverage for nested authoring, deeper grouping, multiline values, old-key compatibility, and locale key parity.
- Refresh the issue 1814 case study with current npm/release data, closed upstream report status, and PR feedback metadata.

## Reproduction

- A focused i18n test failed before the loader replacement because nested `.lino` blocks were not flattened into runtime keys.
- A deeper-nesting regression test failed before applying the PR feedback because several catalogues still used repeated underscore prefixes.
- After the 2026-05-18 PR feedback, the branch still depended on `lino-i18n@0.0.1`; npm reported `lino-i18n@0.1.1` as latest, with upstream support for the missing alias cases.

## Verification

- `node tests/test-i18n.mjs`
- `node examples/test-i18n.mjs`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm run lint`
- `node tests/docs-validation.mjs`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (warnings only for pre-existing near-limit files)
- `npm test` (`All 212 selected test file(s) passed.`)
- `git diff --check`

## Upstream Reports

All follow-up reports filed from the Hive Mind migration are now closed upstream and covered by `lino-i18n@0.1.1`:

- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/10
- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/11
- https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/12

## Notes

- `npm install` emitted a local engine warning because this shell uses Node v20.20.2 while this repository declares Node >=24. The local checks above passed in the same environment.
